title: Leaders of European powers to meet for Ukraine talks

snapshot.title: Leaders of European powers to meet for Ukraine talks
snapshot.description: ROME: The leaders of Europe’s top military powers will meet Wednesday in Berlin, Italy said on Monday, as Europe aims to play a bigger role in trying to end the Ukraine war. The government said Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni would attend the meeting with her British, French, German and Polish counterparts. The announcement came just before British Prime Minister Keir Starmer
snapshot.author: AFP
snapshot.pageTitle: Leaders of European powers to meet for Ukraine talks | Arab News
